caption: In a medical simulation room, a group of healthcare professionals and students are gathered around a patient mannequin lying on a hospital bed covered by a white sheet. A person in pink scrubs and blue gloves stands to the left, while another in a dark blue scrub top and blue pants assists. A woman in a black long-sleeved shirt and blue gloves performs a procedure on the mannequin's chest, while other observers in scrubs and masks stand in the background. The room contains various medical monitors, equipment, and a small table in the foreground holding a blue container and other supplies. The scene progresses as the woman in black adjusts her position and hands move closer to the patient. On-screen text in the bottom corners of the video reads "Day 3" and "Sim Week," accompanying a small purple graphic.
